notes: Mobile projection sheet redesigned as Previous-Current-Next 3-month window with swipe navigation. Approach: every cell gets a data-col attribute; on mobile CSS hides all data-col cells, and a JS-injected style tag reveals exactly 3 columns at a time. Swipe left advances window forward, swipe right back. Tap chevron chips for tap-to-shift. Middle column subtly highlighted in accent green. First column now has full width to wrap labels naturally (140px min, no max). Indicator strip above shows current month chips with 'now' tag when applicable. Touch handler ignores vertical swipes (lets normal scroll happen) and slow drags (>700ms). Desktop unchanged.
